$schema: Utopia Suite brand tokens — source of truth at ~/.claude/rules/utopia-brand-system.md
rules: Four colors only. Every asset — bottle, label, website, Instagram grid, TikTok overlay — pulls from these four and no others. Enforced ruthlessly.
Primary on ivory = correct. Primary on cream = correct. Warm-brown on ivory = correct. Ivory text on primary = only for reversed-out treatments.
NO gradients. NO drop shadows. NO gloss. NO foil. NO clear-label-on-bottle.
If a color outside this palette appears in an asset, the asset is off-brand.

references.aesthetic_anchor: Travis Scott UTOPIA album — see branding/references/
